response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a Junior/Mid-level role. While technical skills (TypeScript, Node.js, React, PostgreSQL-adjacent SQL) clearly exceed requirements, the seniority mismatch creates strong overqualification risk: likely salary expectations far above band, probable disengagement from entry-level scope, and short tenure expected. Berlin location fits on-site requirement, but role progression would frustrate a Staff Engineer.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React fullstack experience across many production systems
Exposure to AI/LLM and MCP tooling aligns with nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch — Staff-level engineer applying for entry-level position
High flight risk and likely salary expectations far exceeding junior band
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js specifically called out; MongoDB is the documented DB experience
